releaseNotes: Added realtime position sliders: Horizontal, Vertical, and Scale.
Translated OBS dock labels to Bahasa Indonesia.
Improved chat queue stability for busy live chat.
Fixed max-message overflow so cards no longer shrink or jump.
Added dynamic card width for short and long messages.
Newest chat is visually more dominant.
Pinned YouTube comments are ignored from the overlay.
Improved monitor scaling and positioning across different resolutions.
